name: Extra-Easy Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat, cook the ground beef until browned, stirring to break up the meat. Once cooked, spoon off any excess fat.
2. Add the spaghetti sauce and heat through, stirring occasionally.
3. Spread 1-1/2 cups of the meat mixture in a 2-quart oblong baking dish.
4. Top with 3 uncooked lasagna noodles, half of the ricotta cheese, and half of the mozzarella cheese.
5. Repeat layers: spread more meat mixture, then continue with 3 uncooked lasagna noodles, half of the remaining ricotta cheese, and half of the remaining mozzarella cheese.
6. Finish by topping with the remaining meat mixture.
7. Slowly pour 1/4 cup water around the edges of the baking dish.
8. Cover tightly with foil.
9. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes.
10. Remove foil and bake an additional 10 minutes.
11. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
~ Makes 8 main dish servings.
